title: Classic single-page website for Coimbatore steam ironing & dry cleaning business (with free stock imagery)

requirements.text: Create a responsive single-page marketing website homepage for a Coimbatore (Tamil Nadu, India) steam ironing, laundry, and dry cleaning business, using a classic, professional layout aligned with common competitor sites.

quotes: I am an independent female who is currently doing steam ironing, laundry and dry cleaning business in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
I need to create a website based on the competitors in this industry with free images depicting the nature of my business and also to be classic in outcome.
Please start with the design with the above specifications mentioned

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage renders without errors and is usable on mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints.
Page is structured into clear sections: Hero, Services, Why Choose Us, How It Works, Testimonials, Gallery, Contact.
All copy is in English and refers to Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
Navigation (header links) smoothly scrolls to each section.

requirements.text: Implement a coherent classic visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, component styling) and apply it consistently across the site. Do not use a blue/purple primary palette.

quotes: also to be classic in outcome

acceptanceCriteria: Typography uses a classic, readable pairing (e.g., serif headings + sans body, or an equivalent classic pairing).
Color palette feels classic/professional (e.g., warm neutrals, charcoal, off-white, subtle gold/emerald accents) and avoids blue/purple as the primary theme.
Buttons, cards, section headers, and spacing are consistent across sections.

requirements.text: Add a Hero section with a strong headline, short supporting text, and clear calls-to-action for contacting the business (Call and WhatsApp).

quotes: Hero Section... Clear tagline like: “Premium Steam Ironing & Dry Cleaning in Coimbatore”.

Contact & Location
  Simple section with call and WhatsApp buttons.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero includes a headline comparable to “Premium Steam Ironing & Dry Cleaning in Coimbatore” (or an equivalent).
Hero includes two prominent CTA buttons: “Call” (tel: link) and “WhatsApp” (wa.me link).
CTA buttons are accessible (keyboard focus styles, discernible text).

requirements.text: Create a Services section with cards for these services: Steam Ironing, Dry Cleaning, Stain Removal, Darning, Saree Pleating & Ironing. Each card must include a short description.

quotes: We do steam ironing for all types of clothing material and we also do dry cleaning for all types of clothing, stain removing, darning, as well as saree pleating and ironing.

Services Overview
  Simple cards for: Steam Ironing, Dry Cleaning, Stain Removal, Darning, Saree Pleating & Ironing.

acceptanceCriteria: Exactly the 5 specified services are displayed.
Each service appears as a visually consistent card with title + 1–2 sentence description.
Cards are responsive (grid adapts across breakpoints).

requirements.text: Add a 'Why Choose Us' section with 4–6 classic, trust-building highlights relevant to local customers (e.g., fabric-safe process, on-time delivery, affordable pricing, experienced handling of sarees).

quotes:
Why Choose Us
  Points like Fast Delivery, Fabric-Safe Process, Affordable Rates, Trusted by Local Families.

acceptanceCriteria: Section shows 4–6 bullet points or mini-cards.
Copy is specific to garment care and local trust (not generic tech/product phrasing).

requirements.text: Add a 'How It Works' section describing the process in 3–4 steps (e.g., Drop-off/Call, Cleaning & Care, Steam Pressing/Finishing, Pickup/Delivery). Keep wording non-committal about pickup/delivery (do not promise unless explicitly configured).

quotes:
How It Works
  Pickup → Cleaning → Pressing → Delivery (even if you currently don’t offer pickup, we can adjust accordingly).

acceptanceCriteria: Section displays 3–4 steps in order.
Language does not guarantee pickup/delivery; it is phrased as options (e.g., “Drop-off or contact us” / “Pickup/Delivery (if available)”).

requirements.text: Add a Testimonials section with 3 placeholder customer reviews (text-only), written in a realistic, professional tone. Do not attribute to real people unless the user provides names.

quotes:
Customer Testimonials
  Clean text-based reviews for trust.

acceptanceCriteria: Three testimonials render consistently and look credible.
No real-person names or unverifiable claims are included.

requirements.text: Add a Gallery section that displays a grid of free stock images depicting steam ironing, laundry care, dry cleaning, and neatly pressed sarees/fabrics.

quotes: with free images depicting the nature of my business

Gallery
  Free photos showing ironing, dry cleaning, sarees, fabrics.

acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays at least 6 images in a responsive grid.
Images are optimized for the web (reasonable file sizes, correct dimensions, object-fit handling).
Each image includes meaningful alt text in English.

requirements.text: Add a Contact section with business details and simple contact actions (Call, WhatsApp). Include fields/placeholders for Address in Coimbatore, Business Hours, and a short note about services. Do not embed interactive maps.

quotes:
Contact & Location
  Simple section with call and WhatsApp buttons.

acceptanceCriteria: Contact section contains: phone placeholder, WhatsApp placeholder, address placeholder, hours placeholder.
Call and WhatsApp actions are functional links (tel: and wa.me).
No map embed or geolocation features are included.

requirements.text: Add basic on-page SEO elements: page title, meta description, and sensible heading hierarchy (one H1, then H2s per section).

quotes: I need to create a website...

acceptanceCriteria: Document title mentions the service and Coimbatore.
Meta description is present and relevant.
Only one H1 exists on the page; sections use H2 headings.

requirements.text: Render all generated images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend (do not route images through the backend).

quotes: with free images depicting the nature of my business

acceptanceCriteria: All required generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Frontend references images via static paths (e.g., /assets/generated/...).
No backend code is introduced for image serving.

constraints: Do not edit files in frontend immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not add maps/geolocation features or embedded map widgets.
Use English for all user-facing text.
nonGoals: Online booking or real-time pickup scheduling
User accounts or third-party authentication (beyond Internet Identity, not needed here)

required: Wide hero photo of steam ironing on a garment with clean, bright workspace (hero-steam-iron.dim_1600x900.jpg)
Photo of neatly folded clean laundry stack on a neutral background (gallery-laundry-stack.dim_1200x800.jpg)
Photo of dry cleaning / garment care professional handling clothes on hangers (gallery-dry-cleaning-rack.dim_1200x800.jpg)
Photo of a crisply pressed saree fabric with visible pleats texture (gallery-saree-pleats.dim_1200x800.jpg)
Photo of stain removal/spot cleaning action on fabric (gallery-stain-removal.dim_1200x800.jpg)
Photo of tailoring/needlework detail representing darning/repair (gallery-darning-needlework.dim_1200x800.jpg)
